events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess fall protection equipment with frayed/burned webbing. The work is rough-complete. Reference: OSHA 1926 Subpart M (construction fall protection) and 1910.140 (general industry personal fall protection systems). Frayed/burned webbing is a defect. According to OSHA, fall protection equipment must be inspected before each use and removed from service if defective. Frayed/burned webbing would render the equipment non-compliant and unsafe. The condition is "installed-defective" and "non-compliant". Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical? Frayed/burned webbing could fail under load, leading to a fall, so critical. Work stage: rough-complete. Percent complete: maybe 90%? But the equipment is defective, so it's not acceptable. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: "Frayed/burned webbing on fall protection equipment." Actions: "Immediately remove defective equipment from service, tag as unusable, and replace with compliant equipment." Rationale: "OSHA requires fall protection equipment to be free from defects; frayed/burned webbing compromises strength and is a critical hazard." References: "OSHA 1926.502(d)(21) - Personal fall arrest systems shall be inspected prior to each use for wear, damage, and other deterioration, and defective components shall be removed from service." Also 1910.140(c)(18) similar. So I'll output JSON.
